ddt:Target.Name: IKEY_X62_V_1_6
ddt:Target.Description:
Version 1.1 Valid for Software : SW1
Version 1.0 : Initial Release for X62 SW1 ================================= Reste à faire : - Metre à jour BP pièce et Hardware - Mettre à jour les LIDs en lecture avec la définition X62 et dénommer "Left" and "right" au lieu de DR and AS
Version 1.1 : MaJ . Ecran CAN network management . Ecran Traceability identification
Version 1.2 : MaJ . Ecran Keyfob learning . Ecran I_O_Control antenna
Version 1.4 : MaJ - Suppression de la requête $30$00 - Suppression de la requête $21$00 - Suppression "Manuel Send" de la trame $21$01 - Suppression de la donnée "ManufacturerIdentificationCode"
Version1.5 : MàJ - Ajout de la trame 21 0B permettant de lire l'historique - Optimisation nom des data et noms des requetes

Item.Text: Received ID has been registered or non ID received
Received ID has not been registered

Data.Name: OTHER DOOR LOCK ACTR OPERATION COMM
NUMBER OF ROOM ANT RECEIVE TIMES
NUMBER OF ROOM ANT SENT TIMES

Item.Text: Back Request SW stuck in active position
Control unit has not learned any I-Key
FRONT LEFT Request SW stuck in active position
FRONT RIGHT Request SW stuck in active position
CHECK NUMBER OF KEY FOB LEARNED
Front Right door ANT sending mode
Front Left door ANT sending mode

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Comment: V.I.N. to be written: 17 characters (in ASCII)

Data.Name: FOB1_Low_battery_counter
Data.Comment: Number of received FOB1 "battery low command"

Data.Name: FOB2_Low_battery_counter
Data.Comment: Number of received FOB2 "battery low command"

Data.Name: Frames monitoring Status of ECM E.C.U.
Frames monitoring Status of CLUSTER E.C.U.
Frames monitoring Status of USM E.C.U.
CAN_failure_record_USM
Data.Comment: This flag tells if USM ECU has been recorded absent on CAN network

Data.Name: Part Number
Data.Comment: Parts No (ASCII) 5 Digit Lower Part, Provided by Renault

Data.Name: Hardware Number
Data.Comment: Parts No (ASCII) Unique Lower Part reference given by renault

Data.Name: Frames monitoring Status of BCM E.C.U.
FRONT LEFT DR LOCK ACTR OPERATION COMM

Item.Text: Front left request SW : All door unlock
Front right request SW : All door unlock
Back request SW : All door unlock
Front left request SW : All door unlock
Front right request SW : All door unlock
Back request SW : All door unlock
Front left request SW : All door unlock
Front right request SW : All door unlock
Back request SW : All door unlock
Front left request SW : All door unlock
Front right request SW : All door unlock
Back request SW : All door unlock
Front left request SW : All door unlock
Front right request SW : All door unlock
Back request SW : All door unlock
Front left request SW : All door unlock
Front right request SW : All door unlock
Back request SW : All door unlock

Data.Name: NUMBER OF ROOM ANT RECEIVE TIMES _TID FIXED CALL

Request.Name: ClearDTC
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

DataItem.Name: Frames monitoring Status of ECM E.C.U.
Frames monitoring Status of CLUSTER E.C.U.
Frames monitoring Status of USM E.C.U.
Frames monitoring Status of BCM E.C.U.

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

DataItem.Name: FRONT LEFT DR LOCK ACTR OPERATION COMM
OTHER DOOR LOCK ACTR OPERATION COMM
NUMBER OF ROOM ANT SENT TIMES
NUMBER OF ROOM ANT RECEIVE TIMES
NUMBER OF ROOM ANT RECEIVE TIMES _TID FIXED CALL

Request.Name: I_OCtrl_Stop_LF ANT FRONT LEFT DR PLANT
I_OCtrl_Stop_LF ANT FRONT RIGHT DR PLANT
I_OCtrl_Start_LF ANT FRONT LEFT DR PLANT
I_OCtrl_Start_LF ANT FRONT RIGHT DR PLANT

Device.Name: Control unit has not learned any I-Key
FRONT LEFT Request SW stuck in active position
FRONT RIGHT Request SW stuck in active position
Back Request SW stuck in active position

Label.Text: Number of receive times ( TID CALL )
Number of receive times ( TID FIXED CALL )

Send.RequestName: I_OCtrl_Start_LF ANT FRONT LEFT DR PLANT
I_OCtrl_Stop_LF ANT FRONT LEFT DR PLANT
I_OCtrl_Start_LF ANT FRONT RIGHT DR PLANT
I_OCtrl_Stop_LF ANT FRONT RIGHT DR PLANT

Display.DataName: NUMBER OF ROOM ANT SENT TIMES
NUMBER OF ROOM ANT RECEIVE TIMES
NUMBER OF ROOM ANT RECEIVE TIMES _TID FIXED CALL
Frames monitoring Status of BCM E.C.U.

Label.Text: Which ID is learnt by IKey and in which memory
ID must by placed near room antenna

Button.Text: I/O Ctrl Verify number of registered keyfob
Stop Verify number of registered key fob
